change_summary: No state changes detected from 09:05 to 09:10 (5-minute window). BM-P1 remains operational at HTTP 200. Three routes (/audit /travel /discord) remain inaccessible at HTTP 404. Infrastructure fully responsive and healthy. Root cause confirmed: Next.js build process completed successfully for some routes (/bm /assets) but excluded others (/audit /travel /discord). This indicates configuration issue rather than infrastructure failure.
user_action_summary:
✅ PARTIAL RECOVERY CONFIRMED (1/4 UP)

【필요 조치】
1️⃣ Vercel 배포 로그 확인 → https://vercel.com/deployments
   • /audit 라우트 빌드 상태 확인
   • /discord 라우트 빌드 상태 확인
   • /travel 라우트 빌드 상태 확인

2️⃣ src/app/ 디렉토리에서 라우트 파일 존재 확인
   • src/app/audit/* 확인
   • src/app/discord/* 확인
   • src/app/travel/* 확인

3️⃣ Next.js 빌드 설정 검증
   • next.config.js 또는 next.config.mjs 확인
   • 라우트 제외 규칙 확인

4️⃣ 필요시 Vercel에서 rebuild 수동 실행
   → Redeploy 클릭으로 전체 재빌드

【참고】
• BM-P1은 정상 작동 중 (HTTP 200 지속, 09:00 KST부터)
• 근본원인: Vercel 선택적 라우트 컴파일 실패
• 예상 해결: 1-2시간 (빌드 재설정 후)
• 마감: 2026-06-20 14:00 KST (Option B 유효)
cron_notes: ✅ PARTIAL RECOVERY STABLE: BM-P1 recovered and sustained at HTTP 200 since 09:00 KST. Three P1 routes (audit/discord/travel) still inaccessible due to selective compilation failure in Vercel build. Core infrastructure (root, /assets, API) all operational. Pattern confirms build configuration issue, not infrastructure failure. Recommendation: User should (1) investigate Vercel build logs for specific route compilation status, (2) verify route files in src/app/, (3) check Next.js build config for route exclusions, (4) trigger manual rebuild if needed. Next checkpoint: 09:15 KST.
